title: Minecraft Dungeons Pigs
description: Ports random pigs from Minecraft Dungeons to Minecraft Java
body:
## **ABOUT:**
This resource pack adds a variation of the pigs from Minecraft Dungeons. 
## **COMPATIBILITY:**
Minecraft: Java Edition 1.20+ is supported.

Optional: [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) is required.
## **SCREENSHOTS:**
![Random pigs (in overworld)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tV53FzpK/images/f0e6108e67f27ed1c57a3f2d39891fe65a2ad47b_350.webp) ![Random pigs (in nether)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tV53FzpK/images/97c35962925af0b160dd048943d2cabeb469ef43_350.webp)
